Headline: #3 King Drive Temporary Northbound Reroute near King Drive/Anthony
ShortDescription: Northbound 3 King Drive buses are temp. rerouted via King Drive, 69th, Keefe, South Chicago and King Drive: due to, street blockage near King Drive/Anthony.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How will this affect my trip?

 

Northbound #3 King Drive buses are temporarily rerouted via King Drive, 69th, Keefe, South Chicago and King Drive: due to, street blockage near King Drive/Anthony.

Southbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
